data.title: Riot sold 3,778 BTC in Q1 due to profitability issues. 500 Bitcoin outflow flagged on Thursday. Other companies sold 15,501 BTC last week.
data.description: Arkham recently detected a significant movement of 500 bitcoins from Riot on Thursday. Additionally, MARA Holdings, Genius Group, and Nakamoto Holdings collectively offloaded a total of 15,501 bitcoins within the past week.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall With Jobs Report Due; Stock Market Hasn't Done This Yet
data.description: Stocks surged during the week despite a significant increase in oil prices. Investors are advised to take note of this development. On Thursday, Tesla experienced a decline due to disappointing delivery numbers. In addition, Dow Jones futures dropped, with the stock market showing a unique trend that has not been observed before. The upcoming jobs report is anticipated to impact this situation.

data.title: Backpack Appoints Nathan Smith as Chief Operating Officer
data.description: Nathan Smith, a former engineering leader at Coinbase, has been appointed as the Chief Operating Officer at Backpack Exchange on April 2, 2026. In his new role, Smith will be responsible for overseeing operations and facilitating the expansion of regulated on-chain financial infrastructure globally. This move comes as Backpack Exchange seeks to scale its organizational structure to support growth in the industry. Smith's experience in engineering and leadership will be instrumental in guiding the company through this phase of expansion.

data.title: Cipla Expands U.S. Respiratory Portfolio with Approval of Nintedanib Capsules (100mg & 150mg) for Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis
data.description: A new development is underway as Cipla USA Inc., a subsidiary of Cipla Limited (BSE: 500087) (NSE: CIPLA), is preparing for an imminent launch in Mumbai, India and Warren, N.J. The announcement was made on April 3, 2026, without citing the source. The company has received official approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

data.title: Best Travel and Sleep Posture Wear (2026): Forme Rated Top Choice for Reducing Muscle Fatigue and Improving Chest Expansion by Consumer365
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in New York, Consumer365 has acknowledged Forme as a distinguished luxury smartwear brand for posture, tailored for enhancing travel and aiding in sleep recovery. The brand stands out for its medical expertise in combating muscle fatigue and promoting chest expansion and improved breathing during extended periods of sitting.

data.title: Coinbase Receives Conditional Nod To Operate As National Trust Company—CEO Brian Armstrong Says 'We're Not Becoming A Bank'
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) announced that it has received conditional approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a federally chartered national trust company. This approval allows Coinbase to operate under federal regulatory oversight for its custody and market infrastructure business. However, the company clarified that it is not transitioning into a commercial bank and will not be accepting retail deposits or engaging in fractional reserve banking. CEO Brian Armstrong emphasized that Coinbase is focused on bringing the infrastructure of crypto under federal regulatory oversight without becoming a bank. This move signifies a step towards regulatory uniformity in the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 02.04.2026
data.description: Nordea Bank Abp recently announced significant changes in its own shares on April 2, 2026. The company repurchased its own shares under the ISIN FI4000297767. The transactions were completed on this date at 22.30 EET in Helsinki. Nordea Bank Abp's LEI is 529900ODI3047E2LIV03. These repurchases indicate strategic moves within the company, reflecting their focus on managing their own shares in the market. This development showcases a proactive approach by Nordea Bank Abp in enhancing its shareholder value and optimizing its capital structure.
